title: pavonia aurantia
intro: Pavonia aurantia, also known as Orange Rockrose or Rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and inflammatory diseases, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from skin irritations and infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
